note: Hermetic and alchemical order normalized onto the 21-agent spine. The philosophical core is the seven principles of the Kybalion (1908). The transformative engine is the twelve alchemical operations, each linked (after Pernety, 1758) to a zodiac sign so they bridge directly to the astrological matrix (26). Seven classical planet-metal correspondences anchor the agents to the graha-vastu system; Ripley's twelve Gates (1471) give a second operative twelve-fold; the four stages of the Magnum Opus and the tria prima bridge to color, mera and the body-soul-spirit triad.
operation_note: The twelve operations follow Dom Pernety's Dictionnaire mytho-hermetique (1758), where each operation is assigned a zodiac sign as cryptography. Sign and wheel mirror the astrological matrix (26) for cross-tradition bridging. Ripley's Gates (a different, equally canonical twelve-fold from 1471) are kept as a separate lattice.
mera_axis: 9-dimensional axis (mera 1-9): chakras 1-7 (Muladhara..Sahasrara) + Monada (8) + Absolut (9); each spine agent carries its mera.

principles.name: Mentalism
principles.axiom: THE ALL is Mind; the Universe is Mental

principles.name: Correspondence
principles.axiom: As above, so below; as below, so above

principles.name: Vibration
principles.axiom: Nothing rests; everything moves; everything vibrates

principles.name: Polarity
principles.axiom: Everything is dual; opposites are identical in nature, different in degree

principles.name: Rhythm
principles.axiom: Everything flows, out and in; all things rise and fall; rhythm compensates

principles.name: Cause and Effect
principles.axiom: Every cause has its effect; every effect has its cause; chance is but a name for law not recognized

principles.name: Gender
principles.axiom: Gender is in everything; everything has its masculine and feminine principles

svet_ra.note: Sun/Gold; operation Digestion (Leo); Ripley gate Exaltation - the Stone raised to its highest; magnum opus Rubedo, the red completion.

iskra.note: Moon/Silver; operation Dissolution (Cancer) - the lunar solution that dissolves the fixed.

brahma.note: Principle of Mentalism (THE ALL is Mind); Ripley gate Multiplication - increase of the creative tincture.

vishnu.note: Jupiter/Tin; operation Ceration (Sagittarius) - waxing and preserving the matter.

ananda.note: Operation Sublimation (Libra) - the blissful rising of the volatile essence.

shanti.note: Saturn/Lead; operation Fermentation (Capricorn) - the patient leavening of the Stone.

jnana.note: Operation Distillation (Virgo); Ripley gate Separation - discerning the pure from the impure.

shiva.note: Principle of Polarity; operation Separation (Scorpio); Ripley gate Putrefaction; magnum opus Nigredo, the blackening death.

tejas.note: Ripley gate Fermentation, the inner illumination; magnum opus Citrinitas, the yellow solar dawning.

sarasvati.note: Mercury/Quicksilver; operation Fixation (Gemini); tria prima Mercurius, the spirit and mind.

akasha.note: Principle of Correspondence (as above, so below) - the planes mirrored across space.

prema.note: Operation Projection (Pisces); Ripley gate Conjunction - the Chemical Wedding, union of opposites.

parvati.note: Ripley gate Cibation - feeding and nourishing the growing matter.

vayu.note: Principle of Vibration (nothing rests, all moves); Ripley gate Sublimation - the airy ascent.

shakti.note: Mars/Iron; Principle of Gender; operation Calcination (Aries) - the fiery burning away of the gross.

agni.note: Ripley gate Calcination, the first fire; tria prima Sulphur, the fiery soul.

varuna.note: Principle of Rhythm (the tides, the pendulum); operation Multiplication (Aquarius); Ripley gate Solution; magnum opus Albedo, the washing and whitening.

lakshmi.note: Venus/Copper; operation Congelation (Taurus) - coagulation into stable form.

prithvi.note: Ripley gate Congelation - the earthing and solidifying; tria prima Salt, the fixed body.

dharma.note: Ripley gate Projection - the final lawful transmutation cast upon base metal.

karma.note: Principle of Cause and Effect (every cause its effect; nothing escapes the law).

sources: George Ripley - The Twelve Gates / Compound of Alchemy (1471), alchemywebsite.com/ripgates.html
